recipe.title: Spicy Strawberry Salsa with Whipped Feta

ingredients.name: strawberries
ingredients.note: diced into small glossy ruby pieces for salsa

ingredients.name: fresh cilantro
ingredients.note: chopped; can be replaced by all basil if cilantro is disliked

ingredients.name: chili powder
ingredients.note: dusts the fruit with red spice

ingredients.name: honey
ingredients.note: or to taste; glossy ribbon for the whipped feta

ingredients.name: grilled bread or tortilla chips
ingredients.note: to serve; toasted baguette is the sexiest dipper for the hero action

steps.text: Dice strawberries into small jewel-like pieces.
steps.visualCue: knife cuts scarlet strawberries into wet ruby cubes with seeds catching light
steps.textureCue: juicy cut faces, glossy berry moisture, seed-speckled skins
steps.runwayRisk: strawberry pieces may become too large or mushy unless locked as small diced fruit

steps.text: Chop cilantro, basil, and deseeded jalapeno.
steps.visualCue: green herbs and jalapeno flecks scatter across the cutting board
steps.textureCue: fine leafy confetti, fresh wet herb edges, tiny chile cubes
steps.runwayRisk: herbs can drift into garnish dust instead of visible chopped leaves

steps.text: Mix strawberries, herbs, lime juice, chili powder, jalapeno, and salt.
steps.visualCue: lime gloss and red chili powder cling to strawberries as the salsa turns shiny
steps.textureCue: loose spoonable salsa, wet ruby fruit, green flecks, citrus sheen
steps.runwayRisk: salsa can become a blended sauce; keep it diced and chunky

steps.text: Whip feta, cream cheese, and honey in a food processor until very smooth, about 2-3 minutes.
steps.visualCue: crumbly feta turns into thick white satin cream with a honey gloss
steps.textureCue: smooth fluffy white spread, soft peaks, dense swirlable body
steps.runwayRisk: cream may look liquid or grainy; prompt must lock whipped, smooth, fluffy feta

steps.text: Swirl whipped feta in a shallow dish.
steps.visualCue: spoon carves a slow spiral trough through thick white feta
steps.textureCue: satiny ridges, thick spoon trails, glossy white valleys
steps.runwayRisk: swirl can flatten into soup unless viscosity and shallow dish are explicit

steps.text: Top the whipped feta with strawberry salsa.
steps.visualCue: ruby salsa tumbles into the white spiral and stains the ridges with lime-chile juices
steps.textureCue: red fruit jewels over white feta, green herbs, chile specks, glossy pooling juice
steps.runwayRisk: salsa quantity can drift too tiny or cover the entire bowl; lock a generous central mound

steps.text: Serve with toasted or grilled baguette and chips for dipping.
steps.visualCue: crisp bread scoops through whipped feta and salsa, lifting a messy creamy ruby bite
steps.textureCue: crunchy toast edge, thick feta smear, juicy strawberry chunks clinging to the bite
steps.runwayRisk: dipper can look dry or disconnected; show visible contact, smear, and cling

assumptions: The creator-provided image is the final plating target: shallow bowl, white whipped feta base, red strawberry salsa mound, herbs, and toasted bread/chips nearby.
No intermediate recipe-specific generated images are planned because the recipe has simple, readable states and the creator asked to avoid unnecessary intermediate references.
The hero dipper should be toasted baguette for the most sensual pull-through shot, with chips optional in the wider final plate.
The video should make the food feel sexy through macro texture, gloss, cream swirls, juice, crunch, and ASMR, without sexualizing the character.
criticalTransformations: Whole strawberries become small glossy diced ruby pieces, not puree.
Loose herbs, lime, chili powder, jalapeno, and salt coat the berries into a chunky spoonable salsa.
Crumbly feta and softened cream cheese whip with honey into a smooth, fluffy, thick white cream.
A spoon swirl creates visible ridges and valleys in the whipped feta before topping.
A generous strawberry salsa mound sits over the white feta without fully burying the swirl.
A toasted baguette scoop pulls through both layers and lifts a creamy, juicy, crunchy bite.
visualTextureOpportunities: Macro strawberry cut: wet seed-speckled red faces and knife shine.
Lime squeeze over berries: bright droplets and sticky citrus sheen.
Chili powder fall: red dust blooming against ruby fruit.
Herb toss: green flecks sticking to strawberry juice.
Food processor vortex: crumbly feta becoming satin white cream.
Honey ribbon disappearing into the cream.
Spoon swirl through thick feta, leaving glossy ridges.
Ruby salsa landing on white feta for a red-white contrast.
Toasted bread scraping through the swirl with audible crunch.
Final messy bite with feta peaks, strawberry chunks, herbs, and chile gloss.
possibleHooks: A toasted baguette tears through a white feta swirl and lifts a ruby strawberry salsa bite in the first second.
Chili powder and lime rain onto wet diced strawberries in an extreme macro opening.
A spoon carves a slow satin spiral through whipped feta before the red salsa crashes into it.
Honey ribbons into feta, then hard cut to a glossy red salsa mound on white cream.
promptPolicySources: creator instruction: make the recipe really sexy and food porn
creator instruction: use the provided final dish image as desired visual
creator instruction: avoid creating intermediate reference images unless indispensable
